site.title: Promo Products | ION Print & Promo
site.description: Formerly IO Promo, ION Print & Promo brings fresh energy and expanded services to help your brand shine. From custom apparel and corporate gifts to promo products and event swag, we're your GTA and Simcoe County promotional product experts.

centreText.title: Everyday Products. Extraordinary Reach.
centreText.description: Discover our custom promotional products, branded swag, corporate gifts, apparel, giveaways, and popular items to boost any event! We help businesses and organizations across Simcoe County, Muskoka and the GTA get noticed.

features.title: Why Promotional Products Work
features.description:
Branded products are one of the most effective tools for marketing, advertising, long-term brand visibility and event exposure.

Whether it's t-shirts, uniforms, hoodies, drinkware, pens, or giveaways, your logo gets repeated exposure and a great return on investment.

ION Print & Promo helps you find products that fit your audience, budget, and goals.
features.imageAlt: Modern digital printing equipment producing high-quality materials

features.title: Check Out Our Promo Showroom!
features.description:
Visit our Barrie showroom at 178 Tiffin Street to explore our full range of promo and signage solutions.

See samples, get inspired, and discover how ION Print & Promo can help power your brand!

Email sales@iongroup.ca for more information or click below to visit our online promo store.
features.imageAlt: Custom printed materials with specialty finishes

cta.heading: We are your one-stop print shop here to power up your business.
